resources.string:
Welcome to Game Space! We attach great importance to your personal information and privacy. In order to protect your rights and comply with relevant regulatory requirements, we explain to you as follows: This Privacy Policy will help you understand the following contents:
1.How We Collect and Use Your Personal Information
2.How We Store and Protect Your Personal Information
3.How We Share, Transfer and Disclose Your Personal Information
4.How Your Personal Information is Transferred Across Borders
5.Your Rights to Your Personal Information
6.How We Handle the Personal Information of Children
7.Third-Party Service Providers and Services
8.Supplement and Update of the Policy
9.How to Contact Us
The Terms of Use will help you understand the following contents:
1.Game Space and its Services
2.Restrictions on the use of This Software and Service
3.Intellectual Property; Ownership
4.Considerations on Your Use of This Software and Service
5.About Updates
6.Software and Services Provided by Third Parties
7.Fees and Advertisement
8.Termination and Breach of Contract
9.Indemnification, DISCLAIMERS, LIMITATION OF LIABILITIES, Governing Laws and Dispute Resolution and Miscellaneous
Please tap the link below to read the %1$s and %2$s.
Unavailable in the current app status
Equilibrium Mode will allocate resources according to the game and the performance of the phone.
Show WhatsApp and Messenger messages in the form of barrages
"Bypass Charging reduces the phone's heating effects while extending the battery life."

"When your phone is connected to the original charger during gaming, the power supply will bypass the battery to power the phone directly, reducing the phone's heating effects and extending the battery life."
Bypass Charging enabled. Battery charging efficiency will be reduced
Bypass Charging enabled. Battery charging will be stopped
The percentage of power used to charge the battery
Start charging after the battery level goes below the charging threshold.
Color inversion helps clearly identify characters moving in games, increasing your winning chances
Swipe inward from the panel handle to activate Smart Panel
InfiniteScrollAdapter is supposed to work only with DiscreteScrollView
"You should not set LayoutManager on DiscreteScrollView.class instance. Library uses a special one. Just don't call the method."
Set ET engine for game optimization
You will exit power saving mode if you enable Esports-grade Control.
Turn on this feature for 2 apps
Select 2 apps to enable floating window while in games.
Only 2 apps supported for floating window
Improve network stability when you play games. New users can try it freely for some days
Change your voice while in games
Slide to show Game Mode Panel
Over 2 hours played straight. Take a break before continuing.
Over 4 hours played totally today. Take a break before continuing.
After 2 hours of non-stop play or 4 hours of accumulated gaming
"When it's enabled, game shortcuts will be hidden on the home screen. Launch and manage all games in %1$s for a clean home screen and smooth gaming experience."
%1$s requires the Notifications permission to push notifications when newly downloaded games are added.
\"%1$s\" has been added to %2$s. Tap to view.
No %1$s strategies for %2$s. You can go to %3$s from the game to add one (only supported for landscape-oriented games).
Select a game app from the list. The selected app will be run in game mode.
Help you win at the starting line
Block reminders other than incoming calls and alarms
Provide vibration feedback in specific game scenes
Optimize CPU and GPU performance automatically to improve game experience
Already adjusted to the best condition
Already adjusted to the best condition. But you still need to pay attention to %1$s.
Decrease screen brightness to protect your eyesight
Have a break to relax your eyes
Increase screen brightness to protect your eyesight
Pay attention to your surroundings while moving
Avoid lying on your back for long periods while using your phone
Turn on health and safety reminders regarding to eyes, sitting posture, anti-addiction system, etc.
The volume for earphones is too high
Add your favorite games to Game Space
Make footsteps louder with enhanced audio source
All settings in the performance panel will be reset to their initial state.
Once enabled, Gaming Temperature Control can effectively reduce the phone temperature and prolong gaming time.
Intelligently adjust game parameters to ensure a better gaming experience for a long time
Esports-grade Control enabled. Device temperature may increase.
Reduce touch latency through the full-link touch control technology, but this will increase device temperature and reduce battery life.
Higher indexes indicate lower power consumption and longer battery life.
Higher indexes indicate higher video quality.
Higher indexes indicate better game control experience.
Higher indexes indicate slower temperature rise.
%d day(s) of free VIP got successfully
已开启极致帧率，将为您提供120fps游戏体验
开启后将为你提供120fps的极致游戏体验，但可能导致发热问题。
"When \"Take Screenshot with 3 Fingers\" is disabled, you can't take a screenshot with 3 fingers."
"When you play games while charging, Smart Charge will reduce the charging power of the battery, reducing the phone's heating effects and extending the battery life."
Tap on the app icon to add it
Improve the control response speed through full-link optimization of touch and display, but this will cause the phone to heat up.
The below listed features are available to you.
Set the in-game frame rate to \"High\" and enable this feature.
You can start in-game mapping by pressing the volume buttons +/-.
Graphic Enhancement is not available in the Eye Care mode.
已开启优化功耗，将为您提供流畅60fps游戏体验
开启后将为你优化发热和功耗，并提供60fps的高帧游戏体验
The new name should not be the same as the original one

Intelligently recognize different game operation zones and optimize accordingly to provide an extreme gaming touch experience. When this is enabled, touch zones will be detected in the first match of each gaming session.
After Wi-Fi is turned off, mobile data will be used instead.
"Optimizes the perception of texture on an object's surface; the stronger the texture, the higher the rating."
Fineness of game texture. Adjusting backwards reduces image quality while boosting performance. (Shifting up softens the image while boosting performance; shifting down improves image sharpness.)
Adjust for higher image quality or higher processing speed.
The recording device is being used by another app. Please close the app first
All features on %1$s will be available for this game after it is downloaded.
You have already got the free VIP
Predict high CPU usage to reduce frame drop and lag
Join us to enjoy magic sound transformation privileges
No network connection. Please check the network status
Change your voice in games in real time.
You can share your feedback through %1$s or contact us at %2$s.
Magic Button allows you to map the functions on the screen to the physical volume buttons, thus customizing the function of the volume buttons for games.
Long press and drag the + or - button to the area that you want to map and trigger
Set the functions of the volume buttons for games
Finished mapping volume button functions. The volume buttons can no longer be used to adjust volume, but you can bring up panel to do so.
Bring up SmartPanel and use it to adjust the volume
How do I adjust volume when Magic Button is turned on?
Long press and drag \"+\" to the the Fire button
You can turn on/off the mapping function of each volume button, and tap Next to set up functions for each button.

You can customize the function of the volume buttons for games. For example, drag the \"+\" button in the picture to the Fire button in the game screen, then save the setting and enter the game. Now you can click the Volume Up button to start shooting.
Increased sensitivity improves touch effects, while decreased sensitivity improves control stability and lessens interference and false touches.
"When it's on, it provides a control experience for games and reduces control response time."
The higher the responsiveness, the more immediate the response to swiping. The lower the responsiveness, the more stable the visuals during swiping.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Higher accuracy enables more precise identification of micro controls, while lower accuracy reduces sensitivity to these controls but improves operational stability.
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year

"Thank you for your trust and for using our products and services. To provide our products and services, we need to access the internet, require some permissions from your phone, and use your personal information: 1. Based on your authorization, we will obtain your system account information for login. 2. Based on your authorization, we will obtain your order information and phone number to complete order payment and provide corresponding paid services. The legal basis for our processing of your information is your consent or a contract with you. By tapping Agree, you indicate your informed agreement to the terms stated in our User Agreement and Privacy Policy."
By clicking AGREE, you agree to the terms stated in our %s and %s.
Do not automatically connect to Wi-Fi when using mobile network.
Intelligently select Wi-Fi and mobile data to reduce network lags. Mobile data may be consumed even when a Wi-Fi network is connected.
Preferentially guarantee network resources for current games with the proprietary game network optimization technology.
No network connection. Please check your network and %s
Messages from non-allowlisted apps will no longer be notified during gameplay.
Floating window is not supported in the current scene
Show WhatsApp and Messenger messages on the game screen in the form of barrages
By tapping Agree, you agree to the terms stated in our %s and %s.
Thank you for your trust and using our products and services. By tapping Agree, you agree to the terms stated in our User Agreement and Privacy Policy.

Thank you for your trust and using our products and services. To provide our products and services, it needs to access to the Internet and requires some permissions of your phones, and also needs to collect and use some data of you. The purpose of our processing is to improve user experiences and to provide services to you. The legal basis we process your data is your consent or the applicable law.
This keeps it in view until you unpin. Touch & hold Back and Overview to unpin.
To unpin this app, swipe up & hold
Slide the panel out from the side of the game interface.

Performance Mode will improve the performance of the phone and is suitable to competitive games. When enabled, it will get higher image quality, but it will increase the power consumption and heat of the device. It is recommended to play in non-high temperature environments.

"No necessary permission.
Please tap \"Settings\"-\"Permission\"-Turn on Permission."
"We need some of the permissions you rejected or the system failed to apply failed, please manually set to the page authorize, otherwise the function can't be used normally!"
"You have rejected us to apply for authorization, please agree to authorization, otherwise the function can't be used normally!"
Tap to view %1$s and %2$s. By tapping \"Agree\", you agree to our permission settings and agreement.
Power Saving Mode will lower the device performance and extend the battery life. It is suitable for games that do not require high image quality.
%1$s will take effect after restarting the game, please restart the game.
Custom optimization for this game will be disabled after the game restarts
Custom optimization for this game will be enable after the game restarts
Change voice in real time in games. Enter %1$s.
No data available. Please try again later
Simulate real lighting effects to create more realistic game visuals.
Video loading error. Please try again later
I have read and agree to %1$s.

%1$s detected large fluctuations in the game network during the last game, with %2$d cases of significant network lag and the maximum network latency of %3$d ms. Enabling game network acceleration can help you reduce the latency to %4$d ms and increase the network speed by %5$d%%
Disable Game Mode for this game?
System navigation needs to be triggered twice in succession to prevent accidental exit from the game.
When the Game Mode is on, temporarily turn off the automatic brightness to ensure that the occlusion is not affected.
Show Game Assistant Panel for a more immersive game experience.
Custom %1$s strategies in Game Assistant Panel are shown here. You can import or share strategies.
Failed to import strategy. Please check whether the model is compatible
Strategy imported successfully. Please check in corresponding game
Copy the %1$s passphrase and share it with your friends. Models supported by the %2$s strategy: %3$s
Hold and drag the top to change the position.
Hold and drag to change position
Swipe inward to activate Smart Panel and open apps in floating windows.
Dynamically provide smart features such as real-time captioning and full-screen translation in certain scenarios.
Quickly open apps in floating windows
Features of Game Mode currently not supported in split-screen mode
Failed to boost. Please check your network and try again
Already got. Please do not claim again
This may increase power consumption & phone temperature.
No network connection. Please check your network and try again
Please insert a SIM card and try again
Login has expired. Please log in again.
Customize control sensitivity and responsiveness based on your preference and skill level.
The tap response is more sensitive, suitable for MOBA games.
The operation is more responsive, suitable for shooting games.
The touch response is more sensitive and accurate, suitable for most games.
Improve your watching experience by effectively preventing notifications from disturbing you.
Swipe and hold from the edges of the screen to open Video assistant panel
New users can get %d day(s) of free VIP
I have read and agree to the %s.
